channel.title: Cursor Blog
channel.description: Cursor Blog — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Improvements to Teams Pricing
item.description: Increasing usage limits, lowering total costs for heavy-usage customers, and making Teams spend easier to forecast and control.

item.title: What we’ve learned building cloud agents
item.description: After a year of shipping cloud agents, we’ve learned that environment quality, durable execution, and the right harness boundaries drive autonomous performance.
